question.label: Personal growth
question.name: Where do you see the biggest gap between where you are now and where you want to be in 12 months?
question.description: Encourages Priya to think about her development and growth trajectory.

answer: More clarity on scope would help. And hearing about big projects before they're locked in, not after.

history.answer_excerpt: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
Growth-wise I think I'm flat. I'm the most senior IC on the team and there's no one really pushing me.
